title: premna resinosa subsp. holstii
intro: Premna resinosa subsp. holstii, also known as African tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Premna resinosa subsp. holstii include treating fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
